summary: Drag-and-Drop Card Reorganization Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: 1) Dashboard loads all 4 card sections (KPI: 4, Payment: 4, Operations: 6, Tables: 2), 2) Edit mode activates via long press (500ms) for admin only, 3) Edit mode bar shows 'Guardar' and 'Cancelar' buttons, 4) All 16 cards have shake animation, drag handles, and hide (X) buttons in edit mode, 5) Role-based access working - Admin (role=admin, role_level=100) can edit, Cajero (role=cashier, role_level=30) cannot, 6) Dashboard API returns valid data with open_shifts field from Supabase pos_sessions, 7) Turnos Abiertos shows correct count (1), Facturas shows bills_count (66).
